name: cerebral-valley-calendar
description: Generate an Apple Calendar compatible ICS feed for SF and Bay Area Cerebral Valley events.

scripts.check: node --check src/build-calendar.mjs && node --check src/event-utils.mjs && node --check src/feed-state.mjs && node --check src/feeds.mjs && node --check src/fetch-events.mjs && node --check src/fetch-luma-events.mjs && node --check src/http.mjs && node --check src/ics.mjs && node --check src/status.mjs && node --test
